text:
Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
Medicare Plan Characteristics Codebook │ October 2025 │ V 1.7 250 

PRE_ICL_INPP_COINS_1M 

LABEL: Pre-ICL Coinsurance Split Network Preferred — One-Month Supply 

DESCRIPTION: This variable identifies the beneficiary co-insurance percentage for a one-month supply of the drugs 
on this tier, using an in-network preferred pharmacy (INPP; also known as a preferred pharmacy 
within a split network) during the pre-initial coverage limit
